# Primorum
> Primorum is the System 2 layer on top of frontier AI — we build dependable workflows that deliver guaranteed outcomes. Start with a free AI Operations Audit. Based in Toronto.

## Core
- [Primorum](https://primorum.ai/): AI you can depend on. Frontier labs sell tokens; we sell delivery. Start with a free operations audit — we identify AI-ready processes, recommend specific tools, estimate costs and returns, and deliver an implementation roadmap at no cost and no commitment.

## Contact
- General: engage@primorum.ai
